title.zh: 约会 App 双语题库 V1
title.en: Dating App Bilingual Question Bank V1

description.zh: 按 8 大维度组织的 MVP 题库，可直接用于入库、前后端联调与匹配特征计算。
description.en: An MVP bilingual question bank across 8 dimensions, ready for storage, frontend rendering, and matching feature computation.

question_text.zh: 在亲密关系里，你更看重哪一点？
question_text.en: What matters most to you in a close relationship?

question_text.zh: 你更认同哪种伴侣关系？
question_text.en: Which idea of partnership do you agree with most?

label.en: Build life together as a team

question_text.zh: 你怎么看待金钱观在关系中的重要性？
question_text.en: How important is alignment on money values in a relationship?

label.en: Neutral, does not need to be very similar

question_text.zh: 当关系进入稳定期，你更期待什么？
question_text.en: Once a relationship becomes stable, what do you hope for most?

question_text.zh: 你更希望另一半在哪方面最可靠？
question_text.en: In what way do you most want a partner to be dependable?

label.en: Care and presence in daily life

question_text.zh: 你现在主要想找什么关系？
question_text.en: What kind of relationship are you primarily looking for right now?

question_text.zh: 你希望关系推进节奏更接近哪种？
question_text.en: Which pace of relationship progression feels right to you?

label.en: Move quickly if it feels right

question_text.zh: 你希望多久见面一次更舒服？
question_text.en: How often would you ideally like to see someone you are dating?

label.en: Very frequently if it feels right

question_text.zh: 你更希望在什么基础上确定关系？
question_text.en: What usually needs to be in place before you define the relationship?

question_text.zh: 如果相处不错，你会倾向多久内进入排他关系？
question_text.en: If things are going well, how soon would you prefer to become exclusive?

question_text.zh: 你的作息更接近哪种？
question_text.en: Which schedule describes you better?

question_text.zh: 你对运动的日常习惯更接近哪种？
question_text.en: Which option best describes your exercise routine?

question_text.zh: 你对居住环境更偏好哪种状态？
question_text.en: What kind of living environment do you prefer?

question_text.zh: 你平时对饮酒的态度更接近哪种？
question_text.en: Which option best describes your attitude toward drinking?

question_text.zh: 旅行方式上你更像哪种？
question_text.en: What is your usual travel style?

question_text.zh: 周末理想状态更接近哪种？
question_text.en: What does your ideal weekend usually feel like?

question_text.zh: 大型社交场合会让你感觉如何？
question_text.en: How do large social gatherings usually make you feel?

label.zh: 可以参加，但时间不要太久
容易耗电，更喜欢小范围相处

question_text.zh: 你在熟人和陌生人面前通常更像哪种？
question_text.en: How do you usually come across around familiar people versus strangers?

label.en: Slow to warm up, relaxed later

question_text.zh: 连续忙了几天后，你更需要什么？
question_text.en: After several busy days, what do you usually need most?

question_text.zh: 和伴侣相处时，你更喜欢哪种节奏？
question_text.en: What kind of social rhythm do you prefer with a partner?

label.zh: 两人世界和朋友局都要有
label.en: A mix of couple time and social time

label.zh: 希望常一起参加社交活动

question_text.zh: 冲突出现时你更倾向？
question_text.en: How do you usually handle conflict?

question_text.zh: 你平时回复消息的习惯更像哪种？
question_text.en: Which option best describes your texting habits?

label.zh: 不一定马上，但会稳定回复
看状态，回复节奏不固定
label.en: Sporadic depending on mood and schedule

question_text.zh: 当你不开心时，更希望对方怎么做？
question_text.en: When you are upset, what do you usually want from a partner?

question_text.zh: 你表达喜欢的方式更接近哪种？
question_text.en: How do you most naturally show affection?

question_text.zh: 你更喜欢哪种约会前沟通方式？
question_text.en: How do you prefer to communicate before meeting for a date?

label.en: A bit of chat, then meet if it feels right

question_text.zh: 你想要孩子吗？
question_text.en: Do you want children?

question_text.zh: 你希望未来和原生家庭保持怎样的距离？
question_text.en: How close do you want your future life to be to your family of origin?

question_text.zh: 你对婚姻的看法更接近哪种？
question_text.en: Which option best reflects your view on marriage?

question_text.zh: 如果未来有孩子，你更接受哪种养育分工？
question_text.en: If you have children in the future, what kind of parenting arrangement feels most acceptable?

label.zh: 按双方工作和状态灵活分配
label.en: Flexible based on workload and circumstances

question_text.zh: 你更期待怎样的家庭氛围？
question_text.en: What kind of family atmosphere do you hope to build?

question_text.zh: 建立亲密感时，你通常更需要什么？
question_text.en: What do you usually need most to build intimacy?

question_text.zh: 你更偏好哪种亲密表达节奏？
question_text.en: Which pace of physical and emotional closeness feels best to you?

label.zh: 有感觉就可以推进快一些
label.en: Faster if the chemistry is there

question_text.zh: 你更希望通过什么方式感受到亲近？
question_text.en: How do you most like to feel close to someone?

question_text.zh: 在关系中，你对边界的态度更接近哪种？
question_text.en: Which option best reflects your attitude toward boundaries in a relationship?

label.zh: 越亲密越好，边界不用太强
label.en: The closer the better, fewer boundaries

question_text.zh: 你觉得稳定关系中的亲密感主要来自哪里？
question_text.en: In a stable relationship, where do you think intimacy mostly comes from?

question_text.zh: 理想周末更像哪种？
question_text.en: What does your ideal weekend look like?

question_text.zh: 下面哪些活动最容易让你投入？
question_text.en: Which activities are most likely to fully engage you?

question_text.zh: 如果第一次约会，你更偏好哪种形式？
question_text.en: What kind of first date do you usually prefer?

question_text.zh: 你更喜欢哪类共同兴趣？
question_text.en: What kind of shared interests do you value most?

question_text.zh: 你希望伴侣在兴趣上的匹配度更接近哪种？
question_text.en: How much shared interest overlap do you ideally want with a partner?

label.zh: 有一些共同兴趣就很好
